items.title: S01E01 - First Meeting
items.summary: Ambushed once again by Helen and Phil, her matchmaking sister and brother-in-law, Laura escapes from the party after being introduced to Mike.

infolabels.title: First Meeting
infolabels.plot: Ambushed once again by Helen and Phil, her matchmaking sister and brother-in-law, Laura escapes from the party after being introduced to Mike.

items.title: S01E02 - Different Answers
items.summary: The day after the party, Helen and Phil get conflicting accounts when they check in with the presumed lovebirds.

infolabels.title: Different Answers
infolabels.plot: The day after the party, Helen and Phil get conflicting accounts when they check in with the presumed lovebirds.

items.title: S01E03 - The Restaurant
items.summary: Mike is ready to jump at another party invitation, but when Laura refuses to go along he invites her out to dinner instead.

infolabels.title: The Restaurant
infolabels.plot: Mike is ready to jump at another party invitation, but when Laura refuses to go along he invites her out to dinner instead.

items.title: S01E04 - Unlucky in Love
items.summary: A new romance buds for Laura, but gets nipped when she discovers the attractive man she met on a business trip to Brussels is already over-committed.

infolabels.title: Unlucky in Love
infolabels.plot: A new romance buds for Laura, but gets nipped when she discovers the attractive man she met on a business trip to Brussels is already over-committed.

items.title: S01E05 - How to Avoid Bankruptcy
items.summary: When Laura realizes Mike's business is failing, she sets out to help him shore up his capital and his morale.

infolabels.title: How to Avoid Bankruptcy
infolabels.plot: When Laura realizes Mike's business is failing, she sets out to help him shore up his capital and his morale.

items.title: S01E06 - Keep Them Apart
items.summary: Mike's van, and where he can park it for the night in Laura's neighborhood, gets in the way of moving their relationship to a higher plane.

infolabels.title: Keep Them Apart
infolabels.plot: Mike's van, and where he can park it for the night in Laura's neighborhood, gets in the way of moving their relationship to a higher plane.

items.title: S01E07 - Playing Games
items.summary: Laura's insecurity mars the couple's first morning together.

infolabels.title: Playing Games
infolabels.plot: Laura's insecurity mars the couple's first morning together.

items.title: S02E01 - A Helping Hand
items.summary: Laura's efforts to dig up new customers for Mike's gardening business are too successful.

infolabels.title: A Helping Hand
infolabels.plot: Laura's efforts to dig up new customers for Mike's gardening business are too successful.

items.title: S02E02 - A Trip to the Dentist
items.summary: To combat her terror of the dentist, Laura is given sedatives that leave her light-headed and flirtatious.

infolabels.title: A Trip to the Dentist
infolabels.plot: To combat her terror of the dentist, Laura is given sedatives that leave her light-headed and flirtatious.

items.title: S02E03 - Was That a Proposal?
items.summary: Both Helen and Laura announce good news prematurely.

infolabels.title: Was That a Proposal?
infolabels.plot: Both Helen and Laura announce good news prematurely.

items.title: S02E04 - The New Secretary
items.summary: Mike gets jealous when a business associate of Laura's appears to have more than business in mind.

infolabels.title: The New Secretary
infolabels.plot: Mike gets jealous when a business associate of Laura's appears to have more than business in mind.

items.title: S02E05 - Boulogne
items.summary: One Sunday, Laura longs for an adventure, but one after another her schemes fall flat.

infolabels.title: Boulogne
infolabels.plot: One Sunday, Laura longs for an adventure, but one after another her schemes fall flat.

items.title: S02E06 - Furniture
items.summary: In the process of furnishing their new shared flat, Mike learns how little faith Laura has in their future together.

infolabels.title: Furniture
infolabels.plot: In the process of furnishing their new shared flat, Mike learns how little faith Laura has in their future together.

items.title: S03E01 - Missing
items.summary: Mike is put on the spot when Laura's parents come to meet him and to celebrate Helen's good news.

infolabels.title: Missing
infolabels.plot: Mike is put on the spot when Laura's parents come to meet him and to celebrate Helen's good news.

items.title: S03E02 - The Hotel
items.summary: Mike accompanies Laura on a business trip. When they arrive at the hotel, Laura tells Mike that she has booked their reservation as Mr. and Mrs. Selway.

infolabels.title: The Hotel
infolabels.plot: Mike accompanies Laura on a business trip. When they arrive at the hotel, Laura tells Mike that she has booked their reservation as Mr. and Mrs. Selway.

items.title: S03E03 - The Dinner Party
items.summary: Laura's plans for a small dinner party get interrupted when Charlie, Mike's assistant, takes ill and calls on Mike and Laura for help.

infolabels.title: The Dinner Party
infolabels.plot: Laura's plans for a small dinner party get interrupted when Charlie, Mike's assistant, takes ill and calls on Mike and Laura for help.

items.title: S03E04 - Business Problems
items.summary: While Charlie convalesces, Mike struggles to run the business single-handedly but refuses to replace Charlie with someone younger.

infolabels.title: Business Problems
infolabels.plot: While Charlie convalesces, Mike struggles to run the business single-handedly but refuses to replace Charlie with someone younger.

items.title: S03E05 - Parenthood
items.summary: Mike prepares to interview applicants for a new landscaping assistant to replace Charlie. Helen and Phil are setting up a nursery. Laura decides that she too would like a baby, but the problem is Mike doesn't.

infolabels.title: Parenthood
infolabels.plot: Mike prepares to interview applicants for a new landscaping assistant to replace Charlie. Helen and Phil are setting up a nursery. Laura decides that she too would like a baby, but the problem is Mike doesn't.

items.title: S03E06 - Extreme Measures
items.summary: Laura and Mike are seriously at odds because they disagree about starting a family. After an all-out, soggy confrontation, Laura makes a bold decision.

infolabels.title: Extreme Measures
infolabels.plot: Laura and Mike are seriously at odds because they disagree about starting a family. After an all-out, soggy confrontation, Laura makes a bold decision.

items.title: S04E01 - The Telephone Call
items.summary: Mike's gardening business is flourishing but he hasn't heard a word from Laura since she fled to Brussels. To escape the attentions of a wealthy Belgian, Laura returns to London, but she can't bring herself to talk to Mike.

infolabels.title: The Telephone Call
infolabels.plot: Mike's gardening business is flourishing but he hasn't heard a word from Laura since she fled to Brussels. To escape the attentions of a wealthy Belgian, Laura returns to London, but she can't bring herself to talk to Mike.

items.title: S04E02 - In Hiding
items.summary: While Laura hides from Mike at Helen's house, Mike becomes concerned that Laura may be in trouble in Brussels. Before Laura can stop him, he flies off to Belgium to check on her.

infolabels.title: In Hiding
infolabels.plot: While Laura hides from Mike at Helen's house, Mike becomes concerned that Laura may be in trouble in Brussels. Before Laura can stop him, he flies off to Belgium to check on her.

items.title: S04E03 - Mike's New Girlfriend
items.summary: Laura decides to approach Mike about getting back some of the money she put into their flat. When she visits him, Laura is astonished to meet Elaine, Mike's sexy new girlfriend.

infolabels.title: Mike's New Girlfriend
infolabels.plot: Laura decides to approach Mike about getting back some of the money she put into their flat. When she visits him, Laura is astonished to meet Elaine, Mike's sexy new girlfriend.

items.title: S04E04 - A Weekend Away
items.summary: Upset about Mike's new girlfriend, Laura goes off to spend the weekend with her parents, hoping they can help her sort out her feelings for Mike. Mike and Elaine quarrel about Laura.

infolabels.title: A Weekend Away
infolabels.plot: Upset about Mike's new girlfriend, Laura goes off to spend the weekend with her parents, hoping they can help her sort out her feelings for Mike. Mike and Elaine quarrel about Laura.

items.title: S04E05 - Problems
items.summary: Feeling the need to get settled on her own again, Laura goes to the flat she once shared with Mike to clear out her belongings. Mike goes along when she checks out a new flat, but he feels very strongly that it is not right for Laura.

infolabels.title: Problems
infolabels.plot: Feeling the need to get settled on her own again, Laura goes to the flat she once shared with Mike to clear out her belongings. Mike goes along when she checks out a new flat, but he feels very strongly that it is not right for Laura.

items.title: S04E06 - A Romantic Meal
items.summary: After a happy night together, Laura and Mike inspect a rundown farmhouse which Mike is thinking of buying. They both fall in love with it. Mike says he wants Laura to live there with him, but Laura misunderstands what he means.

infolabels.title: A Romantic Meal
infolabels.plot: After a happy night together, Laura and Mike inspect a rundown farmhouse which Mike is thinking of buying. They both fall in love with it. Mike says he wants Laura to live there with him, but Laura misunderstands what he means.

items.title: S04E07 - Happy Ever After?
items.summary: Mike and Laura are more stunned than thrilled about their decision, and the fuss Laura's family makes doesn't help. When the farmhouse slips out of their grasp, the old despair seems poised to take over.

infolabels.title: Happy Ever After?
infolabels.plot: Mike and Laura are more stunned than thrilled about their decision, and the fuss Laura's family makes doesn't help. When the farmhouse slips out of their grasp, the old despair seems poised to take over.
